import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { CheckCircle, Users, Clock, Truck, Star, Award, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'; const About = () => { const values = [ { icon: , title: 'Premium Sagwan Wood', desc: 'We source only A-grade kiln-dried teak (sagwan) — the same premium wood used in colonial-era Indian furniture that lasts for generations.' }, { icon: , title: 'B2B & Wholesale First', desc: 'Built for dealers, hotels, restaurants, offices & institutions. Direct-from-factory pricing with minimum order quantities tailored for commercial projects.' }, { icon: , title: 'Open 24 Hours', desc: 'Our Dharavi showroom never closes. Walk in at any hour to browse our live collection and speak directly with our master craftsmen.' }, { icon: , title: 'Custom Sizing', desc: "Every piece can be adjusted to your exact dimensions. Bring your blueprint, measurements or inspiration — we'll make it happen." }, { icon: , title: 'Mumbai Delivery', desc: 'We handle delivery logistics across Mumbai and Maharashtra for both retail and bulk orders.' }, { icon: , title: '5.0 Star Rated', desc: 'Consistently rated 5 stars by wholesale buyers and retail customers alike on Google for our quality, pricing, and service.' }, ]; const exclusions = [ 'Modular Kitchens', 'Built-in Wardrobes', 'TV Units / Wall Panels', 'Fixed Interior Work', ]; return (
{/* Hero Banner */}
हमारे बारे में

Crafted in Dharavi,
Built to Last Forever

A Mumbai-born furniture workshop manufacturing premium teakwood pieces for wholesale dealers, hotels, institutions, and discerning homes since 1999.

{/* Story Section */}

Our Story

V.K. Furniture was born out of a simple belief: that every Indian home and business deserves beautifully crafted, durable furniture at honest prices. From a small workshop on Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg in Naik Nagar, Dharavi, we have grown into one of Mumbai's most trusted wholesale furniture manufacturers.

Our craftsmen bring decades of traditional woodworking expertise to every piece — hand-carving teakwood frames, precision-cutting joints, and finishing with premium lacquers that preserve the natural grain. We specialize exclusively in standalone furniture: sofas, chairs, tables, and beds. We deliberately avoid fixed interior work to keep our focus on what we do best.

Today, our furniture is sold in showrooms across Mumbai, furnishes hotels and restaurants in Maharashtra, and graces homes that value authenticity over mass-produced alternatives.

25+ Years of Craftsmanship
{/* What We Do NOT Make (B2B Clarity) */}

Our Specialization

We are a standalone furniture manufacturer. To protect our quality standards, we do not take on fixed interior work. This focus allows us to be the best at what we do.

We do NOT make:

{item}
))}
{/* Values Grid */}

Why V.K. Furniture?

); }; export default About;
